# Aisaiah Foundation

> The Aisaiah Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building the AIsaiah app —
> a free spiritual companion for daily prayer, Scripture reflection, and service.
> Rooted in the Catholic faith and Couples for Christ, open to all Christian communities.

## About

- Name: Aisaiah Foundation
- Type: 501(c)(3) Nonprofit Organization
- Founded: 2024
- Location: Lewes, Delaware, USA
- Contact: info@aisaiah.org | (443) 347-2424
- Website: https://aisaiah.org

## The AIsaiah App

AIsaiah is a free mobile app (iOS and Android) that helps people build a daily rhythm
of prayer, reflection, and service. It includes guided prayer, daily Scripture readings,
spiritual growth tracking, journaling, and community event management with NFC/QR check-in.

- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/aisaiah/id6751301980
- Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=org.aisaiah.spiritualfitness
- Price: Free
- Privacy: No ads, no data selling — privacy-first by design

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://aisaiah.org/): Main landing page — mission, app overview, and download
- [About](https://aisaiah.org/about): Our story, mission, vision, values, and governance
- [Solutions](https://aisaiah.org/solutions): The AIsaiah app — features, screenshots, download
- [Board of Directors](https://aisaiah.org/board): Leadership and governance
- [Team](https://aisaiah.org/team): The people building AIsaiah
- [Partnerships](https://aisaiah.org/partnerships): How churches and ministries can partner with us
- [CFC-USA Partnership](https://aisaiah.org/partnerships/cfc-usa): Our founding partnership with Couples for Christ USA
- [Events](https://aisaiah.org/events): Community events and gatherings
- [Contact](https://aisaiah.org/contact): Get in touch — partnerships, volunteering, donations
- [Blog](https://aisaiah.org/blog): Articles on faith, technology, and ministry

## Blog Posts

- [Why We Built AIsaiah](https://aisaiah.org/blog/why-we-built-aisaiah): The founding story — why a group of CFC members built a prayer app
- [Faith Communities Deserve Better Technology](https://aisaiah.org/blog/faith-communities-deserve-better-technology): Why churches and ministries need purpose-built tools
- [Our Approach to Privacy in Ministry Tech](https://aisaiah.org/blog/our-approach-to-privacy-in-ministry-tech): How we protect spiritual data
- [The Case for Purpose-Built Ministry Platforms](https://aisaiah.org/blog/the-case-for-purpose-built-ministry-platforms): Why generic tools fall short for faith communities

## Key Facts

- Three spiritual pillars: Pray, Reflect, Serve
- AI-powered guidance grounded in Church teaching
- Event management with registration, NFC/QR check-in, and photo galleries
- Built for individuals, small groups, parishes, and large conferences
- Tax-deductible donations accepted
